title: Ethan Selinger Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Ethan Selinger Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Ethan Selinger
Khoury Staff
BA in Elementary Education and History, University of Rhode Island
Career Changer
When Ethan Selinger felt unsure about his future as a schoolteacher, he met with a career advisor. Over the course of their conversations, he discovered his real passion lay in helping others find clarity within their own careers, and served as Khoury College’s Assistant Director of Align Career Advising.
I help people get jobs, I help people find their direction. I can’t actually do that work, so I am brand new to tech, but it’s a representation of how you can use your strengths to help people, even if their domain knowledge isn’t your domain knowledge
Ethan Selinger, Assistant Director of Align Career Advising
Explore all Khoury Stories
